name: 格雷厄姆·哈维
name_full: 格雷厄姆·哈维 Graham Harvey
birth_place: 美国,德克萨斯州,达拉斯

last_movies.title: 暗夜情报员 第二季
芝加哥警署 第十季

introduction: Graham Harvey is a talented and versatile actor who began his career at the age of 7 when he starred in his first commercial for Crayola. Since then, Graham has made a name for himself in commercials, TV shows, and films, impressing audiences and industry professionals alike. Most recently he has been overseas filming for an exciting new project to hit the screens in 2026, as well as a few surprises that will come out later this year.Over the years, Graham has had the privilege of working alongside some of the best in the industry, learning from top-tier directors, producers, and actors. In addition to his on-screen work, he has a passion for music and is skilled in both the drums and guitar. On set, he is known for his infectious positivity and kindness, with colleagues frequently commenting on how engaging and joyful he is to work with. He has a way to connect with his audience both on and off screen.Graham is also an accomplished live theater performer, having been part of over 10 musicals. His exceptional ability to quickly master and memorize content-whether in acting or music-sets him apart in any role he tackles. Outside of his career, Graham enjoys traveling, experiencing new cultures, and meeting people from all walks of life. He has a natural gift for making others smile and leaves a lasting impression wherever he goes.
